title: Fleet Refit Report
description: Artifact produced by Worker apply_refit_bundle subroutine. Records which surfaces were created during fleet refit execution. Written to changesets/outbox/refit_<operational_id>.json.

process_id.description: References the execution process this refit belongs to.

repo_alias.description: Alias of the repo that was refitted.

refit_applied.description: True if refit bundle was applied. False if repo was already aligned or refit was blocked.

surfaces_created.description: List of surfaces created during refit (e.g., heir.doctrine.yaml, .github/workflows/garage-certification-gate.yml, changesets/outbox/, audit_reports/, .garage/README.md). Empty array if refit_applied is false.
